Ox-ac..personality: A deeply sensitive, nervous individual prone to physical and mental exhaustion, particularly affecting the heart and nervous system. They are introverted with an aversion to conversation, oscillating between states of exhilaration and profound dejection. Their suffering is markedly amplified by mental focus — symptoms worsen when thinking about them — suggesting a constitution where mind and body are unusually intertwined.
Ox-ac..mental_state: The mind alternates between excitement and loss of memory, with episodes of maniacal conduct giving way to mental dullness and an empty-headed sensation. Concentration worsens their condition, as pains and symptoms intensify when attended to mentally. There is a tendency toward mental fog, vanishing of sight, and dizziness from cerebral congestion.
Ox-ac..emotional_pattern: The core emotional pattern is one of anxious vulnerability — frightening dreams, waking in cold sweat with palpitation, and a pervasive sense of physical fragility that feeds emotional withdrawal. They swing between nervous excitability and flat dejection, avoiding social engagement. An undercurrent of fear runs through the constitution, tied to cardiac distress and the overwhelming nature of their paroxysmal pains.
